name: Ggio Vega
description:
__Height:__ 163 cm (5'4")
 __Number:__ 26

Ggio Vega is the smallest member of Barragan's fracción. The remains of his mask resemble the skull of a sabre-tooth tiger, and are worn like a helmet. He shares a similar attitude to Soi Fon, his opponent in the battle over the fake Karakura town, but Ggio is even more arrogant and enjoys flaunting his perceived superiority as an assassin. His zanpakutō is called Tigre Estoque and is released with the command "bite off" . Its abilities are currently unknown, as mere moments after he releases his second form, Tigre Estoque El Sable he is killed by Soi fon using Suzumebachi.    He appears in the anime from episode 221 to 223.
